rationale: Educ. Code §11.151 governs the general powers and duties of school district trustees. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or property tax policy, so no direct conflict arises from increasing the exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Except as provided by Sections 39A.201 and 39A.202, the trustees as a body corporate have the exclusive power and duty to govern and oversee the management of the public schools of the district.
_note: While the proposed change would indirectly affect school district property tax revenue, this statute contains no operative provision regarding homestead exemptions or tax rates. No conflict found.
